dailyNews.title: Iran's focus on survival means same regime still firmly in place
dailyNews.description: Tehran is showing resilience despite Trump's claims of regime change, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

dailyNews.title: Baby shot dead in pram in New York City, police say
dailyNews.description: The seven-month-old child is the unintended victim of a suspected gang-related shooting, officials say.

dailyNews.title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
dailyNews.description: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US and Israeli war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan to continue with Iran-US mediation despite ‘obstacles’
dailyNews.description: Islamabad's statement follows Trump threatening to bomb Iran 'back to the Stone Ages'.

dailyNews.title: Who is Kamal Kharazi? Former Iranian Foreign Minister ‘critically injured’ in US-Israeli strike on his home
dailyNews.description: Kamal Kharazi, ex-Iranian foreign minister, sustained serious injuries in a US-Israeli strike that also resulted in his wife's death. Kharazi, a key advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader, was involved in back-channel negotiations with the US, which critics say the attack aimed to sabotage.

dailyNews.title: Macron responds to Trump mocking his marriage: ‘Neither elegant nor up to standard’
dailyNews.description: During the lunch, Trump mimicked a French accent while commenting on Macron’s marriage: “I call up France, Macron – whose wife treats him extremely badly. Still recovering from the right to the jaw.”

dailyNews.title: ‘Bomb back to the Stone Age’: US history of threats and carpet bombing
dailyNews.description: Analysts say carpet bombing countries is a war crime. But it wouldn't be new for the US.

dailyNews.title: Macron calls Trump's remarks on his marriage 'inelegant'
dailyNews.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".

dailyNews.title: Smoke rises over Mashhad, Iran, following strike near airport
dailyNews.description: Footage shows columns of smoke rising over the Iranian city of Mashhad, after US-Israeli strikes near the airport.

dailyNews.title: Middle East war boosts EV demand; US, Europe car-selling platforms see surge in inquiries
dailyNews.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East war, reports suggest that car-selling platforms in the US and Europe are seeing an uptick in inquiries for electric vehicles (EVs). This comes as Iran continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz shut in retaliation for the US-Israel war

dailyNews.title: BJP against illegal infiltrators, not Assam’s indigenous Muslims: Amit Shah
dailyNews.description: Amit Shah says BJP targets illegal infiltrators, not Assam’s indigenous Muslims; accuses Congress of giving issue a communal spin ahead of polls

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrants will no longer get in-state tuition in Kentucky after federal ruling
dailyNews.description: A federal judge permanently blocked Kentucky's in-state tuition policy for illegal immigrants, ruling it violated federal law and the Supremacy Clause.

dailyNews.title: Lead Nancy Guthrie cop had no homicide experience, sheriff benched top detectives: sources
dailyNews.description: Sources say Pima County Sheriff Nanos allegedly sidelined experienced detectives in the Nancy Guthrie case, raising questions about his leadership.

dailyNews.title: NYC slices may have nothing on one sizzling Midwest pizza style
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: US targets Chinese robots over security fears
dailyNews.description: Senators Cotton and Schumer introduced the American Security Robotics Act to ban federal agencies from using robots tied to foreign adversaries like China.

dailyNews.title: 'Price Is Right' producer defends Bob Barker against sexual harassment claims in documentary
dailyNews.description: Longtime "Price Is Right" producer Roger Dobkowitz called the "Dirty Rotten Scandals" documentary a hit piece and defended late host Bob Barker's legacy.

dailyNews.title: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld announce birth of first child
dailyNews.description: NFL star Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld announced on Thursday that the actress had a girl. She made a post on her Substack about the birth of their first child.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Providence mayor slams mural project dedicated to slain Iryna Zarutska
dailyNews.description: Providence Mayor Brett Smiley slammed the canceled mural honoring Iryna Zarutska, a slain Ukrainian refugee, calling the privately funded project divisive.

dailyNews.title: Child goes viral for excited, blunt response to reporter's question about Artemis II moon mission
dailyNews.description: A child went viral for his excited response about the Artemis II moon launch on CNN, catching the attention of NASA administrator Jared Isaacman, who said he would send NASA gear.

dailyNews.title: FBI notified Congress last week of China-linked hack deemed 'major incident'

topStories.title: Trump elevates immigration fight at Supreme Court, turning up heat on Democrats ahead of midterms
topStories.description: Strategists say Trump's historic Supreme Court presence and birthright citizenship fight could energize MAGA voters ahead of midterms as Republicans defend fragile House majorities.

topStories.title: Every Trump Threat to Abandon NATO Hollows It Out
topStories.description: Doubts that the United States would come to the aid of NATO allies increase each time, prompting Europeans to consider an alliance without Washington.

topStories.title: 5 Takeaways From Trump’s Speech on Iran
topStories.description: President Trump did not define a clear path out of the conflict, which he estimated would end within three weeks.

topStories.title: U.K. to Host Talks on Securing Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: It was not clear whether the talks, expected to involve dozens of countries, would satisfy President Trump’s demand that other nations take a more active part in the Iran war.

topStories.title: Trump Says Strait of Hormuz Is Not America’s Problem, and How Musk May Get Richer
topStories.description: Plus, does every middle schooler really need a laptop?

topStories.title: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
topStories.description: President Trump has not made a final decision, but he has floated the idea of replacing Ms. Bondi with Lee Zeldin, the E.P.A. administrator.

dailyNews.title: Trump Faces a Tough Fight With His New Budget
dailyNews.description: Last year, the president proposed many steep spending cuts that Congress never granted. This time, he may face an even tougher sell.

dailyNews.title: Primetime Trump
dailyNews.description: We have takeaways from the president’s address to the nation.

dailyNews.title: Trump likely to replace Bondi as attorney general, but no final decision yet
dailyNews.description: President Trump is seriously considering replacing Pam Bondi as attorney general, sources familiar with the matter told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.

dailyNews.title: Stocks slide after Trump vows to continue Iran strikes
dailyNews.description: Stocks are sliding after investors were left unsettled by President Trump's Wednesday night speech.

dailyNews.title: Gov. Whitmer seeks federal disaster declaration after deadly March 6 tornadoes
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer requested a major disaster declaration from President Donald Trump after tornadoes in Branch, Cass and St. Joseph counties killed four people and destroyed homes and businesses.

dailyNews.title: Can Trump really pull the U.S. out of NATO?
dailyNews.description: President Trump continues to slam the members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization for their lack of support in the Strait of Hormuz as the Iran war rages on. Jack Detsch, a defense reporter at POLITICO, joins CBS News with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Eye Opener: Trump addresses nation on Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump addresses the nation on the Iran war, but does not offer a definitive timeline on how the war could wrap up. Plus, NASA's historic Artemis II mission lifts off, sending astronauts on a journey around the moon. All that and all that matters in today's Eye Opener.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration prepares up to 100% pharmaceutical tariffs on some imported drugs
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is preparing to impose new tariffs on drugmakers that have not struck deals with the president to lower their U.S. drug prices.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil prices soar 10% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
dailyNews.description: Oil surged as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Iran's war propaganda homes in on Trump with Lego memes
dailyNews.description: Iranian propaganda is also homing in on the war's destabilizing impact on the global economy and energy prices, which have shot up in the U.S.
